beats.text: Before I go, there is one more thing you need to understand. Not because you will use it now — because you will encounter it later and the recognition will matter.

The KLOB manufacturing pipeline. Base alloy processing, field geometry, plasma channeling, final assembly. I will walk you through it once. Pay attention to the crystal seat — that is where the system's vulnerability lives.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: Voices below, through the canopy grate. Saffron. A man you do not recognise, speaking with the certainty of someone who has not had to justify themselves in a long time.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The weapon is the subject. The Fae are the target. The man frames it as logistics, not war — supply chains and asset clearance. The clarity of it is worse than if he had been angry.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: Footsteps on the stairs. The conversation below goes quiet. Someone is coming.

beats.speaker: 0014_ROYL
beats.text: There you are. I have been looking for the new apprentice. The west corridor is faster from here.

beats.speaker: 0014_ROYL
beats.action: turns without waiting for a response
